mapper.select:
/* PRVYY_SAMM_VERSUS_PRDCTN_STTUS_Dao_retrievePrvyySammVersusPrdctnSttusSetcscByList */
SELECT /*+ LEADING(THSYY PRVYY) */ THSYY.elcpwstn_cls_nm AS setcsc_nm, PRVYY.elcpwstn_cd, PRVYY.elcpwstn_nm, PRVYY.r2 AS prvyy_prdctn_epwr, THSYY.r2 AS thsyy_prdctn_epwr, CASE WHEN THSYY.r2 > 0 AND PRVYY.r2 > 0 THEN ROUND(THSYY.r2 / PRVYY.r2 * 100, 0) ELSE 0 END AS achiv_rt FROM ( SELECT elcpwstn_cd, MAX(elcpwstn_nm) AS elcpwstn_nm, SUM(r2) AS r2 FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE mt = ( SELECT MIN(mt) FROM MONTH_LIST ) GROUP BY elcpwstn_cd ) PRVYY, ( SELECT MAX(elcpwstn_cls_nm) AS elcpwstn_cls_nm, elcpwstn_cd, MAX(elcpwstn_nm) AS elcpwstn_nm, SUM(r2) AS r2, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(elcpwstn_cls_cd) AS elcpwstn_cls_cd, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE mt = ( SELECT MAX(mt) FROM MONTH_LIST ) GROUP BY elcpwstn_cd ) THSYY WHERE PRVYY.elcpwstn_cd(+) = THSYY.elcpwstn_cd ORDER BY hq_cd_dsply_ordr, elcpwstn_cls_cd, dsply_ordr

/* PRVYY_SAMM_VERSUS_PRDCTN_STTUS_Dao_retrievePrvyySammVersusPrdctnSttusDeptByChartList */
SELECT /*+ LEADING(THSYY PRVYY) */ THSYY.cstct_nm AS dept_nm, PRVYY.elcpwstn_cd, PRVYY.elcpwstn_nm, PRVYY.r2 AS prvyy_prdctn_epwr, THSYY.r2 AS thsyy_prdctn_epwr, CASE WHEN THSYY.r2 > 0 AND PRVYY.r2 > 0 THEN ROUND(THSYY.r2 / PRVYY.r2 * 100, 0) ELSE 0 END AS achiv_rt FROM ( SELECT elcpwstn_cd, MAX(elcpwstn_nm) AS elcpwstn_nm, SUM(r2) AS r2 FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE mt = ( SELECT MIN(mt) FROM MONTH_LIST ) GROUP BY elcpwstn_cd ) PRVYY, ( SELECT MAX(cstct_nm) AS cstct_nm, elcpwstn_cd, MAX(elcpwstn_nm) AS elcpwstn_nm, SUM(r2) AS r2, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(elcpwstn_cls_cd) AS elcpwstn_cls_cd, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE mt = ( SELECT MAX(mt) FROM MONTH_LIST ) GROUP BY elcpwstn_cd ) THSYY WHERE PRVYY.elcpwstn_cd(+) = THSYY.elcpwstn_cd ORDER BY hq_cd_dsply_ordr, elcpwstn_cls_cd, dsply_ordr
